tasks.subject: Task 1: baseUrl() config helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A single source for the app's public origin, reading BASE_URL with a localhost fallback.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/config.ts` (add baseUrl; isEditUiEnabled already lives here)
- Test: `tests/unit/config.baseurl.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] baseUrl({BASE_URL:'https://q.example'}) → 'https://q.example'
- [ ] baseUrl({}) → 'http://localhost:3000'
- [ ] Accepts injectable env object

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/config.baseurl.test.ts` → PASS.

**Steps:** TDD — RED (not a function); add `baseUrl(env=process.env)=>env.BASE_URL ?? 'http://localhost:3000'`; GREEN; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/config.ts", "tests/unit/config.baseurl.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/config.baseurl.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BASE_URL value returned", "localhost fallback", "injectable env"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wire AUTH_SECRET/BASE_URL into better-auth + DRY callers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** betterAuth() uses AUTH_SECRET/BASE_URL explicitly; all app-origin reads go through baseUrl().

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/auth.ts` (explicit secret/baseURL; trustedOrigins from BASE_URL)
- Modify: `lib/email-templates.ts` (use baseUrl())
- Modify: `app/api/plans/route.ts` (use baseUrl())
- Modify: `app/app/settings/tokens/page.tsx` (use baseUrl())
- Modify: `tests/unit/email-templates.test.ts` (stub BASE_URL)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] lib/auth.ts passes secret: process.env.AUTH_SECRET and baseURL: process.env.BASE_URL; trustedOrigins from BASE_URL + TRUSTED_ORIGINS
- [ ] email-templates/plans route/tokens page read origin via baseUrl()
- [ ] No BETTER_AUTH_URL reads remain in app/ or lib/
- [ ] email-templates.test.ts stubs BASE_URL and passes

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/email-templates.test.ts && CI=true pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && CI=true pnpm exec next lint` → PASS/clean.

**Steps:** add secret/baseURL to betterAuth(); trustedOrigins from BASE_URL; import baseUrl() in the 3 callers (remove any local baseUrl literal in email-templates); switch test stub to BASE_URL; grep app lib for BETTER_AUTH_URL → 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/auth.ts", "lib/email-templates.ts", "app/api/plans/route.ts", "app/app/settings/tokens/page.tsx", "tests/unit/email-templates.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/email-templates.test.ts && CI=true pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && CI=true pnpm exec next lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["betterAuth gets secret+baseURL explicitly", "callers use baseUrl()", "no BETTER_AUTH_URL in app/lib", "test uses BASE_URL"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Rename in deployment/config + README + grep guard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** All operator-facing config and docs use the new names; no BETTER_AUTH_ token remains in tracked files.

**Files:**
- Modify: `.env.example`
- Modify: `docker-compose.yml`
- Modify: `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
- Modify: `README.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] .env.example declares AUTH_SECRET + BASE_URL, no old names
- [ ] docker-compose.yml passes AUTH_SECRET/BASE_URL
- [ ] ci.yml sets new names
- [ ] README uses new names + notes breaking rename
- [ ] grep -rn 'BETTER_AUTH_' (excl node_modules/.git/.next) → zero hits

**Verify:** `grep -rn "BETTER_AUTH_" . --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git --exclude-dir=.next` → no output; `CI=true pnpm exec vitest run` → PASS.

**Steps:** rename .env.example two vars + comments; compose env keys; ci.yml env (~lines 17/38); README all mentions + breaking note; grep guard 0 hits; full suite green; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".env.example", "docker-compose.yml", ".github/workflows/ci.yml", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -rn 'BETTER_AUTH_' . --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git --exclude-dir=.next ; CI=true pnpm exec vitest run", "acceptanceCriteria": [".env.example renamed", "compose renamed", "ci.yml renamed", "README renamed + breaking note", "zero BETTER_AUTH_ hits"]}
```
